body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: claim→dispatch rename in queue
body.description:
**What changed:** claimed_at renamed to dispatched_at in cc_queue.py and devices/queue/device.py; cmd_claim stub removed; log action strings updated.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Any external script reading queue JSON and looking for 'claimed_at' will silently get None — could affect monitoring, stall_check, GitHub sync, any tool reading raw queue rows. (2) Existing Postgres rows in the queue metadata JSONB still have 'claimed_at' key — old rows silently return nothing on dispatched_at queries. (3) Tests renamed but not migrated may flip silently. (4) action_claim_verifier.py is explicitly excluded from rename — verify no test harness crosses the two 'claim' namespaces.
**Signals to watch:** stall_check.py output showing correct ticket ages after rename; GitHub sync still running; no 'dispatched_at is None' errors in Granny logs when it should be set; grep of production logs for stray 'claimed_at' references.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-27 or after first full Granny dispatch cycle post-rename.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** All predicted effects checked; outcome annotated; ticket closed with one-line verdict.
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
